div.p: Complete sequence from CPU interrupt to iret return

g.text: Process B has its own stack

div.p: ⚠️ CRITICAL: Forgetting EOI blocks ALL future interrupts!

ul.li: No awareness interruption occurred Except: time has passed!

div.p: Maximum handler time: ~100μs Why? Other interrupts blocked!

ul.li: Disk: DMA handles data transfer If handler takes too long:

div.p: Problem: If handler enables interrupts and another interrupt fires, same handler may re-enter! Solutions:

ol.li: Returns to NEW process! Old process resumes later when its time slice comes
